vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache Log4j2 Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apache Log4j2 contains a remote code execution vulnerability (Log4Shell) where attackers can execute arbitrary code.
vulnerabilities.notes: This vulnerability affects Log4j2 library used across thousands of products.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: HTTP/2 Rapid Reset Attack (affects multiple vendors)
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The HTTP/2 Rapid Reset Attack can cause denial of service by resetting streams rapidly.
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Apply vendor-specific patches for affected HTTP/2 implementations.
vulnerabilities.notes: Affects nginx, Apache, IIS, and cloud providers.

vulnerabilities.shortDescription: FortiOS SSL VPN contains an out-of-bounds write vulnerability allowing unauthenticated RCE.
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Apply updates per vendor instructions or disable SSL VPN.
vulnerabilities.notes: Actively exploited by nation-state threat actors.
